globalNews.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
globalNews.summary: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

globalNews.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
globalNews.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been sentenced to four years in jail.

globalNews.title: Brazil woman dies after rope-jumping instructors fail to attach cord
globalNews.summary: Three men have been arrested after instructors failed to attach a rope to her before helping her jump from a bridge.

globalNews.title: South African jazz legend Abdullah Ibrahim dies at 91
globalNews.summary: Ibrahim helped define a genre of South African jazz music in a career that spanned eight decades.

globalNews.title: MSF staff abused Sudanese refugees in sex-for-food scandal
globalNews.summary: Some victims said they chose not to speak out because they feared staff would cut off access to aid.

cryptoNews.title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin snatched upside liquidity as the US trading session began, but traders warned over a failure to preserve BTC price gains.

cryptoNews.title: Pudgy Penguins winds down Pudgy Party mobile game
cryptoNews.summary: Pudgy Penguins will halt development of Pudgy Party and focus on Pudgy World, as another Web3 gaming project shuts down after failing to find a sustainable business model.

cryptoNews.title: Saylor’s Strategy buys 1,587 BTC for $100M, holdings hit 846.8K
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy acquired 1,587 Bitcoin for $100 million last week, lifting holdings to 846,842 BTC after raising $209 million through MSTR stock sales.

cryptoNews.title: Tokenization could push DeFi assets to $2.7T by 2030: Standard Chartered
cryptoNews.summary: Standard Chartered forecasts assets locked in decentralized finance will reach $2.7 trillion by 2030, driven by tokenization and crypto-native growth.

aiNews.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
aiNews.summary: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export control restrictions on Anthropic’s models Fable and Mythos, arguing that the order is going to limit the abil

aiNews.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
aiNews.summary: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

aiNews.title: Sarvam becomes India’s newest AI unicorn with $234 million funding round led by HCLTech
aiNews.summary: Indian IT services company HCLTech is investing $150 million in the Bengaluru startup.

aiNews.title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities
aiNews.summary: NewCore argues the next challenge in enterprise security will be managing AI agents, not people.

aiNews.title: A satellite just learned to find things on its own — here’s what that means
aiNews.summary: In April, for the first time ever, an Earth observation satellite found what it was looking for, all on its own.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
